case_title: ROJAS RAQUEL VS AVILA SALVADOR et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT AVILA SALVADOR HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUL-22-1991, GRANTED

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,479.50 FILED BY AVILA SALVADOR MARIA ERLINA AVILA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ROJAS RAQUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROJAS RAQUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVILA SALVADOR MARIA ERLINA AVILA $850.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $858.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT AVILA SALVADOR MARIA ERLINA AVILA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ROJAS RAQUEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
